name: pixel-agents-web
description: Pixel Agents Web — browser-based pixel art office with AI agents

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:client && npm run build:server && npm run build:agent-node
scripts.demo: cd server && DEMO=1 DEMO_AGENTS=5 PORT=13001 node dist/index.js
scripts.demo:record: echo '🎬 Starting recording-ready demo (5 agents, port 13001)...' && cd server && DEMO=1 DEMO_AGENTS=5 PORT=13001 node dist/index.js
scripts.lint: npm run lint:client && npm run lint:server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:client && npm run typecheck:server
